## Quality Gates

- [ ] `pnpm comments:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Relevant tests pass (`unit` / `integration` / `e2e`)

## Feature Commit Discipline

- [ ] This PR uses feature-complete commits (no unrelated feature mixing).
- [ ] Each feature commit includes implementation + tests + required comments/JSDoc.
- [ ] I did not commit directly to `development` or `master`.

## Documentation

- [ ] DEV-DOCS and README updates are included if behavior/workflow changed.
